description: FILE 1 OF 2. THE AGENT. Install at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/SKILL.md, OVERWRITING v1.0 entirely. v2.0 is a LEARNING system, not a protocol. New: PART 0 blindspot register (10 things v1.0 could not do); PART II compounding architecture (Forge Ledger, Change Warrant, Lesson Ledger, agent self-calibration by prediction scoring, competence vector); PART III POWER DOCTRINE with measured sigma(forward R)=1.28 and the resulting n-tables (a 0.05R edge needs 7,654 trades at alpha=.01; a cell of n=1000 has MDE 0.138R and CANNOT see a genuine 0.09R edge -- so 'thousands of tests' on small cells is a data-mining machine); PART IV NULL-GHOST (run the ghost on phase-destroyed and sign-flipped surrogates; verified PASS at meanR +0.0325/-0.0318, p=0.12 -- and the residual +/-0.03R at n=3800 IS the apparatus noise floor, the humility constant); PART V CALIBRATION/LIVE PARITY INVARIANT (same function, not equivalent function; 500-bar live-sync replay must match decision-for-decision); PART VI COMPOSITION ORDER (pooling before shrinking is FATAL); PART VII THE VOICE (logging must show deltas, surprise, and what was ruled out; STAGNATION/DEGENERACY/SATURATION/FLATLINE/OVERCONFIDENCE alarms; reference log voice provided); 8-class discrepancy register (added POWER and PARITY); H1-H10 and R1-R10 gates; 11-stage sequence starting at Stage -1 Read The Ledger; 15 standing prohibitions.
